inputs.label: Operating Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total hours machine has been operating

inputs.label: Coefficient: Operating Hours
inputs.businessContext: Effect of operating hours on log hazard

inputs.label: Coefficient: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Effect of temperature on log hazard

inputs.label: Coefficient: Vibration
inputs.businessContext: Effect of vibration on log hazard

inputs.label: Coefficient: Maintenance Score
inputs.businessContext: Effect of maintenance compliance on log hazard (negative reduces hazard)

formulas.linearPredictor: inputs.beta_hours * inputs.operatingHours + inputs.beta_temp * inputs.temperature + inputs.beta_vibration * inputs.vibration + inputs.beta_maintenance * inputs.maintenanceScore
formulas.hazardRatio: Math.exp(inputs.beta_hours * inputs.operatingHours + inputs.beta_temp * inputs.temperature + inputs.beta_vibration * inputs.vibration + inputs.beta_maintenance * inputs.maintenanceScore)
